name_cn:
TWINNY Series M46659 Uninspected Version#
✶ Size:29*19*9cm ✶
The Twinny series incorporates all current trending features, using a classic vintage print color combination to maximize the fashion sense!
Double strap design allows for multiple carrying styles, enhancing practicality!
The classic vintage print color combination brings 90s retro vibes into modern life!
The overall size and capacity are very user-friendly, making it eye-catching at first glance🔜Stylish and retro, truly love it!
